Hero.name: Evren Keskin
Hero.title: Product Manager | Product Owner
Hero.subtitle: E-commerce & Marketplace
Hero.description: Product professional with an engineering background, working across product management, product ownership, and delivery in e-commerce and marketplace environments.

About.description_1: Experienced in prioritizing requests, defining requirements, aligning stakeholders, and coordinating execution across both internal and external software teams.
About.description_2: Strong in balancing urgency, feasibility, and cost while guiding delivery through requirement clarity, rollout readiness, and continuous stakeholder communication.

Experience.heading: Professional Experience
Experience.subheading: Roles and responsibilities throughout my career journey

jobs.description: Support the execution and improvement of 4 products across e-commerce, food ordering, courier, and warehouse operations. Translate business, field, and leadership needs into clear product requirements. Manage product execution across a dealer/franchise ecosystem of 40-50 affiliates, ensuring the right problems are addressed.

Managed day-to-day content and operational updates for WordPress-based e-commerce websites. Supported marketplace operations across Trendyol, N11, and Hepsiburada, ensuring listing quality and operational maintenance.
Developed reusable UI components in Angular within an agile product development environment. Contributed to cleaner implementation and consistent interface patterns.
Built mobile UI screens using React Native. Applied UI/UX best practices to support usability and tested behaviors across multiple devices.

Projects.heading: My Projects
Projects.subheading: Featured projects focusing on delivery and architecture

items.title: Career Tracking Portal
items.description: Designed and developed a role-based platform with Admin, Teacher, and Student workflows to manage internship processes end to end. Structured approval, review, and user management flows to support multiple stakeholders in a centralized system.

items.title: Apartman Plus
items.description: Designed a modular SaaS concept for residential site management covering role-based access, resident and unit structures, facilities, finance, operations, and document workflows.

items.title: Hızır Global Corporate
items.description: Developed a full-stack, multilingual (TR, EN, RU, AZ) corporate web platform for Hızır Global, Turkey's integrated commerce ecosystem. It features a brands showcase, media center, franchise application systems, and a custom admin panel for managing the corporate content.

items.title: Cube Runner 2D
items.description: My first game project, developed while learning game development. It is an endless 2D runner game featuring a parallax background effect. I plan to introduce my own custom mechanics and features into this project in the future.
